However, given the lack of clear visual details provided by the color plate, Option D remains the safest and most inclusive option if we must choose from these choices alone. Therefore, my final stance adheres closely to the original rationale but seeks additional assurance through potential clarification steps outside our current context.

raw_response:
I do not believe there was any uncertainty regarding which procedure might apply here; rather, it appears all three terms refer specifically to types of tooth extraction involving partial removal of roots. However, given the lack of clear visual details provided by the color plate, Option D remains the safest and most inclusive option if we must choose from these choices alone. Therefore, my final stance adheres closely to the original rationale but seeks additional assurance through potential clarification steps outside our current context.
